form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 350m at Goulburn (19.67), beating Travelling Gem. Top chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 350m at Goulburn (19.67), beating Travelling Gem. Top chance again.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.14) over 520m at this track. Overdue and expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.14) over 520m at this track. Overdue and expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (20.71) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Aided by a low draw but prefer the place this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished fourth (20.71) last start at this track. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Aided by a low draw but prefer the place this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and again approaching the finish.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a fast 20.67 over the 365m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a fast 20.67 over the 365m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.75 lengths second but did clock a useful 20.66 over the 365m journey. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.75 lengths second but did clock a useful 20.66 over the 365m journey. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (19.88) at Goulburn, making it two placings on end. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when third (19.88) at Goulburn, making it two placings on end. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 365m (20.59) beating Nicko King in Mix 1/2/3 on April 2. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 365m (20.59) beating Nicko King in Mix 1/2/3 on April 2. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 365m at this track in a handy (20.85), beating Paw Ultron. Has clocked a scorching 20.36 here at this trip. Can give a great sight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 365m at this track in a handy (20.85), beating Paw Ultron. Has clocked a scorching 20.36 here at this trip. Can give a great sight.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Mix 2/3 on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Lord Panama, beaten 14 lengths (21.02). Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth in a Mix 2/3 on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Lord Panama, beaten 14 lengths (21.02). Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped off heels in the first turn and lost ground.
At first corner contacted the heels and fell.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 13 over 365m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Can't enthuse on this occasion.
